name: Magic Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chicken parts, more or less
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the spices (except garlic) together and blend well.
2. Rub the spice mixture into the chicken pieces.
3. Arrange the chicken pieces in a microwaveable casserole dish and pour in the orange juice to cover.
4. Mince the garlic and add it to the juice, then add any remaining spice mixture.
5. Microwave for 30 minutes at 70% power, turning the pieces over halfway through to ensure even heating.
6. People watching fat can remove the skin from the chicken (or use skinless pieces) before serving; people eating fat can leave it on.
7. Optionally, place the cooked pieces under a broiler for a couple of minutes on each side to brown and crisp them up slightly.
8. The orange juice can be reused for up to two additional batches, though it will no longer be suitable for breakfast servings.
